feedback: Trial admins could not find the activation checklist after creating a workspace. They needed support to explain the next setup step.
The buyer imported feedback but did not invite teammates because the product did not explain why collaboration mattered during setup.
The onboarding checklist helped our team understand what was done and what still needed attention before launch.
CSV upload failed because the required columns were unclear. The error message did not say which field was missing.
Security reviewers asked for clearer setup progress because the admin console did not show whether SSO validation was complete.
The first report was useful, but the team wanted a clearer path from imported notes to a shareable roadmap summary.
Users expected sample import templates before uploading a full CSV. They were worried about breaking their workspace.
The product made it easy to connect feedback sources, but the first analysis took too long to understand.
Mobile setup was straightforward, but notification defaults were too noisy for a new workspace.
Our PM created a workspace and had a useful theme summary in the same afternoon.
